name: Fabricated Fields
description: This court does not exist and is exists only for testing. It's not a pickleball court. Please do not come here expecting to play pickleball.

name: Wilderness Lodge
description: Come play pickleball at Wilderness Lodge in Lesterville, MO! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water. You can reserve the courts. The courts are private.
fees: Private — Courts always open to our guests. For day passes just call and book your time.
